meta.title: Temperate Coliphage HK022: Virions, DNA, One-step Growth, Attachment Site, and the Prophage Genetic Map

abstractHtml: Temperate coliphage HK022 has 45 x 51 nm heads, 106 nm long, flexible tails, and linear DNA of 26.4 x 106 mol. wt. The prophage attachment site (atthtt) is co-transducible with pyrD and is located between pyrD and pyrC.
